question: Has agnostic covariate-vs-signature-activity association already been done, and was positive-control recovery of known aetiologies demonstrated?
headline_finding: Agnostic covariate-signature association is an established sub-field (TCSM, signeR 2.0, Diffsig, PPF) with two large systematic scans (Sorensen 2023 DNA-repair, Vali-Pour 2022 germline). h08's novel delta must narrow to unsupervised expression-MODULE covariates + cross-decomposition concordance + pre-registered positive-control gating.

novelty_verdict.H08a_positive_control: feasible and corroborated; multiple papers recover UV/smoking/APOBEC/MMR unprompted. Confirmatory-of-method, not novel.
novelty_verdict.H08b_discovery: must narrow to expression-module / cross-decomposition niche; generic covariate-signature discovery is scooped by Robinson2019 / Sorensen2023.

papers.title: Modeling clinical and molecular covariates of mutational process activity in cancer (TCSM)
signeR 2.0: relating signature exposures to clinical data
Diffsig: associating risk factors with mutational signatures
papers.pdf_gap_reason: bioRxiv-only preprint, no OA repo, bioRxiv blocks automated download

papers.title: Pan-cancer association of DNA repair deficiencies with whole-genome mutational patterns
papers.role: closest design template for the scan shape

papers.title: The impact of rare germline variants on human somatic mutation processes
Supervised mutational signatures for obesity and other tissue-specific etiological factors (SuperSigs)
Poisson process factorization for mutational signature analysis with genomic covariates (PPF)
Interplay between mutational signatures and tumor microenvironment: a pan-cancer analysis
papers.role: closest to expression/immune axis; not de-novo modules

papers.title: Somatic ERCC2 mutations are associated with a distinct genomic signature in urothelial tumors
Mutational processes of tobacco smoking and APOBEC activity generate protein-truncating mutations
papers.role: functional interpretation support for arms B/C

action_items: Narrow H08b scope to expression-module / cross-decomposition delta before its pre-registration
Cite Robinson2019 (TCSM) as method predecessor in method:h08-agnostic-association-model
Use Sorensen2023 as the scan-shape design template
Record H08a feasibility corroboration against pre-registration:h08-positive-control
t177 done; future H08b pre-reg must claim only the expression-module niche
